stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Whilst flying the outbound leg of a procedural VOR approach, a pilot's PFD is as shown in the figure above. Just before they are to commence their procedure turn, they set the course selector to the inbound course of the approach. Which of the figures shows the correct HSI indication at this time, and which direction must the pilot turn to intercept the inbound course?

options.a: Figure 2, the pilot must make a left turn.
options.b: Figure 1, the pilot must make a left turn.
options.c: Figure 1, the pilot must make a right turn.
options.d: Figure 2, the pilot must make a right turn.
